params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of results to return per request.

params.name: offset
params.description: Number of results to skip for pagination.

params.name: type
params.description: Filter by campaign type such as classic or trigger.

params.name: startDate
params.description: Filter campaigns created on or after this date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: endDate
params.description: Filter campaigns created on or before this date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

params.name: statistics
params.description: Type of statistics to include in the response, such as globalStats or linksStats.

items.docs: Retrieves a paginated list of all email campaigns created in the account. Supports filtering by type, status, and date range. Campaign statistics may be included in the response depending on the requested statistics type.
Creates a new email campaign with the specified content, recipients, and scheduling options. The campaign can use HTML content or a pre-built template and can target specific lists or segments.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the email campaign.

params.name: statistics
params.description: Type of statistics to include such as globalStats or linksStats.

items.docs: Retrieves the details of a specific email campaign including its content, recipients, scheduling, and performance statistics.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the email campaign.

items.docs: Updates an existing email campaign with new content, recipients, or scheduling options. Only draft campaigns can be fully updated.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the email campaign.

items.docs: Permanently deletes an email campaign by its unique identifier.

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the email campaign.

items.docs: Triggers the immediate sending of an email campaign that is in draft status. The campaign must have valid content and recipients configured before sending.

info.name: Send a test email for a campaign

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the email campaign.

items.docs: Sends a test version of an email campaign to the specified email addresses for review before launching the actual campaign.

info.name: Export recipients of an email campaign

params.name: campaignId
params.description: Unique identifier of the email campaign.

items.docs: Exports the recipients of a specific email campaign for analysis or processing. The exported data includes recipient details and their interaction status.
